recommendations.title: Evilspeak
recommendations.overview: Bullied by classmates, a pudgy military-school student fights back by computer with the devil.

recommendations.title: There's Only One Jimmy Grimble
recommendations.overview: Jimmy Grimble is a shy Manchester school boy. At school he is constantly being bullied by the other kids, and at home he has to face his mother's new boyfriend. However, through football, and some special boots, he manages to gain the confidence to s

recommendations.title: 976-EVIL
recommendations.overview: A bullied unpopular high school student named Hoax finds an ad for 976-EVIL, a number that provides daily 'horrorscopes'. But when he calls the number he gains demonic powers, which he uses to seek vengeance against those who bullied him.

recommendations.title: The Class
recommendations.overview: An average guy of an Estonian high-school decides to defend his bullied classmate. This starts a war between him and the informal leader of the class.

recommendations.title: Bad Education
recommendations.overview: A superintendent of a school district works for the betterment of the student’s education when an embezzlement scheme is discovered, threatening to destroy everything.

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.

recommendations.title: Doubt
recommendations.overview: In 1964 Bronx, two Catholic school nuns question the new priest's ambiguous relationship with a troubled African-American student.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.
